title: (Bullish Signal) HUN, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Nov 02, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that HUN's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 74 similar cases where HUN's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 62 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $25.00 is above $24.15 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/01/20 - 11/02/20, the price experienced a +14% Uptrend. During the week of 10/26/20 - 11/02/20, the stock enjoyed a +0.72% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/wp3vxk6673x51.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=0b9d2eae2688b483e41dc8a3d3da209cb9e66d3f

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 02, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on HUN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 62 of 74 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

Following a +3.69% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where HUN advanced for three days, in 247 of 312 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 210 of 283 cases where HUN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 74%.
